meta.stub_status: Stub — only README.md + UPSTREAM.md exist; no source code

pillars.name: Architecture
pillars.rationale: No code, modules, or architectural boundaries exist. README mentions 'Dashboard UI' and 'Backend API & storage (AgilePlus)' at a concept level only.

pillars.name: Dev Loop
pillars.rationale: README documents 4-step setup (seed, install deps, build/test, deploy). No actual watch-mode, hot-reload, or dev loop infrastructure.

pillars.name: Agent Loop
pillars.rationale: No CLI, no MCP server, no A2A protocol, no agent tooling of any kind.

pillars.name: Observability
pillars.rationale: No structured logs, metrics, traces, dashboards, or alerting.

pillars.name: Security
pillars.rationale: No SBOM, no SAST, no signed commits, no security policy, no .gitignore.

pillars.name: Performance
pillars.rationale: No benchmark harness, no perf budgets, no p50/p99 tracking.

pillars.name: Extensibility
pillars.rationale: No plugin system, hooks, custom adapters, or theming.

pillars.name: Compliance
pillars.rationale: No LICENSE file committed. Upstream Plane.so uses Apache 2.0. Fork heritage noted in README but no copyright attribution or license tracking.

pillars.name: Complexity
pillars.rationale: No code to measure complexity against.

pillars.name: Type Safety
pillars.rationale: No TypeScript configuration, no tsconfig.json, no type definitions.

pillars.name: Dependencies
pillars.rationale: No package.json, no lockfile, no dependency management of any kind.

pillars.name: Error Handling
pillars.rationale: No code, no typed errors, no error context propagation.

pillars.name: Logging
pillars.rationale: No logging infrastructure.

pillars.name: Data Layer
pillars.rationale: No ORM, no migrations, no DB schema, no data layer.

pillars.name: API Surface
pillars.rationale: No API routes, no OpenAPI spec, no request validation.

pillars.name: Frontend
pillars.rationale: No components, no design system, no accessibility, no responsive layout. Upstream Plane.so has a full component library.

pillars.name: I18n/A11y
pillars.rationale: No translations, no locale detection, no a11y audit.

pillars.name: Concurrency
pillars.rationale: No async code infrastructure.

pillars.name: Memory
pillars.rationale: No memory management, no leak detection.

pillars.name: Config
pillars.rationale: No env files, no config schema, no .env.example (upstream has one).

pillars.name: Testing Depth
pillars.rationale: No test files, no test framework, no test infrastructure.

pillars.name: Fuzzing
pillars.rationale: No fuzzing harness. Reasonable to defer until application logic exists.

pillars.name: Release
pillars.rationale: Two commits exist with conventional-ish commit messages. No release infrastructure, no semver tag, no changelog.

pillars.name: Migration
pillars.rationale: No upstream seeding done (blocking dependency). No data/API migration infra.

pillars.name: Vendor Lockin
pillars.rationale: Repo is explicitly a fork of Plane.so — acknowledged in README. Fork relationship documented. Upstream seeding pattern avoids lock-in. Points for explicit documentation of provenance.

pillars.name: Event Driven
pillars.rationale: No event system. Will come from upstream Plane architecture.

pillars.name: Infrastructure
pillars.rationale: Vercel deployment mentioned in README. No IaC, no Dockerfile, no k8s manifests. Upstream has docker-compose files.

pillars.name: Cost Efficiency
pillars.rationale: No cost tracking or budgets defined.

pillars.name: Monitoring
pillars.rationale: No dashboards, alerting, or monitoring infrastructure.

pillars.name: Onboarding
pillars.rationale: Getting started section in README covers 4 steps. No quickstart script, no sample app, no interactive tutorial. Upstream Plane.so has full documentation.

pillars.name: Packaging
pillars.rationale: Vercel deployment mentioned. No Dockerfile, no container image, no multi-arch.

pillars.name: Distribution
pillars.rationale: No package registry, no GHCR, no npm publishing.

pillars.name: Install
pillars.rationale: No one-line install script. Manual 4-step process described in README.

pillars.name: Update
pillars.rationale: No auto-update, no delta updates, no rollback.

pillars.name: Reproducibility
pillars.rationale: No lockfile, no hermetic builds. Will come from upstream seeding (pnpm-lock.yaml).

pillars.name: Portability
pillars.rationale: No platform-specific testing. Upstream targets Linux + macOS.

pillars.name: Container Quality
pillars.rationale: No Dockerfile, no container optimization.

pillars.name: Signing & Trust
pillars.rationale: No cosign, no sigstore, no key management.

pillars.name: Artifact Storage
pillars.rationale: No artifact versioning or storage.

pillars.name: Installer UX
pillars.rationale: No installer, no progress bar.

pillars.name: CLI UX
pillars.rationale: No CLI. Web frontend only.

pillars.name: Desktop App
pillars.rationale: No desktop app. Web-only frontend.

pillars.name: Mobile App
pillars.rationale: No mobile app, no PWA manifest.

pillars.name: Web App
pillars.rationale: Deployment target is Vercel web app. No PWA support, no offline mode, no deep links yet.

pillars.name: Tauri Shell
pillars.rationale: No Tauri desktop shell. Upstream does not use Tauri.

pillars.name: Electron
pillars.rationale: No Electron shell. Not in scope.

pillars.name: System Integration
pillars.rationale: No OS integration (shortcuts, URL handlers, file dialogs).

pillars.name: Notifications
pillars.rationale: No notification system.

pillars.name: Update Channels
pillars.rationale: No update channel management.

pillars.name: Hardware/Edge
pillars.rationale: No ARM/RPi/IoT deployment targets.

pillars.name: Splash Screen
pillars.rationale: No branded splash. Will come from upstream seeding.

pillars.name: Animations
pillars.rationale: No animation system or micro-interactions.

pillars.name: Custom Art
pillars.rationale: No branded mascot or custom artwork.

pillars.name: Animated Art
pillars.rationale: No animated art or generative visuals.

pillars.name: Icons
pillars.rationale: No app icon, favicon, or platform icons.

pillars.name: Typography
pillars.rationale: No font system, no webfont loading.

pillars.name: Color System
pillars.rationale: No design tokens, no color palette, no dark mode.

pillars.name: Theming
pillars.rationale: No theme system. Upstream Plane has light/dark mode.

pillars.name: Brand Consistency
pillars.rationale: Phenotype branding established at README level. 'Planify' name, logo mention in README, links to phenotype.space. No OG images or social cards.

pillars.name: Visual Regression
pillars.rationale: No snapshot tests or visual regression testing.

pillars.name: Contributing
pillars.rationale: Setup documented in README with 4 steps. Links to upstream Plane.so. No CONTRIBUTING.md, no code style guide, no code review process documented.

pillars.name: Testing for Devs
pillars.rationale: No test infrastructure, no test data factories.

pillars.name: Debug
pillars.rationale: No debug configurations, no breakpoints config.

pillars.name: Profiling
pillars.rationale: No profiling tools configured.

pillars.name: Refactor Safety
pillars.rationale: No type-driven refactoring, no dead code detection.

pillars.name: Code Search
pillars.rationale: No search tools configured beyond IDE defaults.

pillars.name: Knowledge Sharing
pillars.rationale: README covers architecture overview and purpose. No ADRs, no runbooks, no postmortems.

pillars.name: Tooling Integration
pillars.rationale: No ESLint, no Prettier, no LSP config, no editor setup.

pillars.name: Documentation
pillars.rationale: README.md (34 lines) + UPSTREAM.md (20 lines) exist. Covers purpose, architecture, setup, and upstream seeding. No auto-generated docs, no examples.

pillars.name: Issues/PRs
pillars.rationale: GitHub issues available via repository. No issue templates, no PR templates, no label system.

pillars.name: First-Run
pillars.rationale: No zero-config startup, no demo mode, no value-in-30s flow.

pillars.name: Onboarding
pillars.rationale: No onboarding flow, no interactive tutorial, no progressive disclosure.

pillars.name: Empty States
pillars.rationale: No empty state illustrations or prompts.

pillars.name: Error UX
pillars.rationale: No error UX patterns, no helpful error messages.

pillars.name: Performance UX
pillars.rationale: No loading states, no skeleton screens, no optimistic updates.

pillars.name: Accessibility
pillars.rationale: No WCAG compliance, no ARIA, no keyboard navigation patterns.

pillars.name: Multi-locale
pillars.rationale: No i18n infrastructure.

pillars.name: Multi-platform
pillars.rationale: No cross-platform sync or cloud backup.

pillars.name: Offline-first
pillars.rationale: No offline support, no local cache, no sync.

pillars.name: Personalization
pillars.rationale: No preferences, no custom themes, no custom shortcuts.

pillars.name: Solo-Operation
pillars.rationale: README readable by agents — describes repo purpose, architecture, and setup clearly. No AGENTS.md, no CLAUDE.md.

pillars.name: Bug Detection
pillars.rationale: No static analysis, no runtime checks.

pillars.name: User Story Gap
pillars.rationale: No story coverage matrix.

pillars.name: Friction Detection
pillars.rationale: No UX friction logging.

pillars.name: Polish Awareness
pillars.rationale: No visual regression tests or animation budgets.

pillars.name: Continuous Audit
pillars.rationale: This audit is the first. No automated audit pipeline.

pillars.name: Self-Healing
pillars.rationale: No retry logic, no circuit breakers.

pillars.name: Learning Loop
pillars.rationale: No feedback collection or user surveys.

pillars.name: Cost Awareness
pillars.rationale: No cost tracking or budgets.

pillars.name: Explainability
pillars.rationale: No decision traces or audit trails.

pillars.name: README Quality
pillars.rationale: README covers: project description, status (stub), deployment targets, architecture overview, getting started steps, and ecosystem links. Missing: badges, screenshots, examples, CI status, license badge. Scores above average for stub quality.

pillars.name: API Docs
pillars.rationale: No API documentation. Upstream Plane.so has API docs.

pillars.name: Architecture Docs
pillars.rationale: README includes architecture section describing Planify as web frontend to AgilePlus. Mentions shared domain models and Phenotype ecosystem. No diagrams or C4 model.

pillars.name: Tutorial Series
pillars.rationale: No tutorials.

pillars.name: Cookbook
pillars.rationale: No recipes or common-tasks guide.

pillars.name: ADR System
pillars.rationale: No ADR system. Will need to document forking decisions.

pillars.name: Roadmap
pillars.rationale: README explicitly notes stub status. UPSTREAM.md documents seeding plan. No formal roadmap with milestones or release schedule.

pillars.name: Changelog
pillars.rationale: No changelog. Two commits exist but no structured release notes.

pillars.name: Community
pillars.rationale: README links to AgilePlus repo and phenotype.space. References upstream Plane.so community. No dedicated forum, discord, or CoC for Planify itself.

pillars.name: Support
pillars.rationale: No support portal, no SLA, no issue tracker configuration.

pillars.name: Hypervisor Support
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend. Compute layer handled by Phenotype infra.

pillars.name: Container Runtime
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: WASM Runtime
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: OS Distribution
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Init System
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Scheduling
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Networking
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Storage
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Secrets
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.name: Marketplace
pillars.rationale: No plugin or theme marketplace.

pillars.name: Billing/Quota
pillars.rationale: No billing or quota system.

pillars.name: Multi-tenancy
pillars.rationale: Upstream Plane.so has multi-tenant architecture. Not yet seeded.

pillars.name: Compliance/SOC2
pillars.rationale: No compliance documentation or controls.

pillars.name: Disaster Recovery
pillars.rationale: No backup/restore or DR plan.

pillars.name: Upgrade Path
pillars.rationale: No upgrade mechanism. Upstream seeding is the first 'upgrade' — no process documented.

pillars.name: Webhooks/API Integration
pillars.rationale: README mentions integration with AgilePlus. No webhook system, no API versioning.

pillars.name: SDK
pillars.rationale: No SDK. Upstream may provide API access.

pillars.name: SLA/Uptime
pillars.rationale: No SLA definitions or status page.

pillars.name: Performance Budget
pillars.rationale: No performance budgets defined or tracked.

pillars.name: macOS Native FFI
pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend. No native macOS integration needed.

pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

pillars.rationale: N/A for web frontend.

totals.letter_grade_description: F (<55%) — Stub: only foundational metadata exists
